commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio describe node ip-10-1-12-160.us-east-2.compute.internal 2>&1 | grep -E "Taints|Allocatable|DiskPressure" | head -20'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get node ip-10-1-12-160.us-east-2.compute.internal -o yaml 2>&1 | grep -A 3 taints'
